hints.text: Plate = EU blue strip + the **coat of arms on a red circle** (visible through the blur; Albania's has no red circle)
All Gen4 = smallcam; Gen3 = **long antenna + rifts inland**, **short antenna + no rifts on the coast**
Small & **mountainous**: inland lush green, coastal mountains = exposed light-coloured rock; roads only 1–2 lanes
Bollard white w/ **red front / white back reflector + a black top** (also found in Slovenia)
Guardrails often **rusted**; Montenegro is the only Balkan country where both **A- and B-type** guardrails are common
North = green farmland valleys; **Bay of Kotor** touristy w/ a steep rocky ridge; Podgorica = dry mountains + vineyards; **Durmitor NP** = grassy treeless high mountains
